inputs.reasoning: Many alternations inside a Kleene star forces many jobs onto the BitState stack, triggering GrowStack when njob_ >= maxjob_
Nested alternations with capture groups exercises kInstAlt and kInstCapture switch cases, pushing many jobs
Alternations of repeated patterns create complex job stacks in TrySearch, exercising the main while loop and CheckAndLoop
Chain of non-capturing alternations exercises kInstAlt with ShouldVisit checks and the switch(ip->opcode()) dispatch
Top-level alternations of captures exercise kInstByteRange (p < end check) and kInstCapture with many stack entries
Non-greedy quantifiers may trigger kInstAltMatch with non-greedy path, exercising the greedy/non-greedy branch
Named captures with alternations exercises kInstCapture switch and kInstAlt, creating multiple stack entries
Deeply nested alternations in a star quantifier maximizes stack pressure to trigger GrowStack
Right-recursive alternation nesting creates a deep chain of kInstAlt nodes exercising CheckAndLoop and ShouldVisit
Multiple character class repetitions create many kInstByteRange instructions exercising the p < end check repeatedly
